title: avena pratensis var. longifolia
intro: Avena pratensis var. longifolia, also known as oat grass, is a subspecies of the wild oat plant that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Avena pratensis var. longifolia include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality. Avena pratensis var. longifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used as a natural remedy for insomnia and other sleep disorders.
